creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Although I appreciate the sentiment, there's not really an effective way for us to test compatibility with different versions of CMake. I suppose we could have put in something when CMake 3.23 landed to prevent use of older CMakes anywhere -- that would have avoided your plist problem.

We can probably express "you must build with the latest CMake" in the ports tree better. I've attached a patch for that.
